01
● published

0 to ~85% AI-assisted delivery adoption

Took a 9-person engineering team from zero baseline to ~85% measured AI adoption in two quarters.

2025 · betting · eng lead

03— positioning

Ten-plus years across software, product, and operations in regulated, high-traffic betting. Hands-on with AI-assisted delivery, internal tooling, automation, and workflow design.
